text.title: Embeddings Model Selection — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example illustrating the full procedure for `embeddings-model-selection` against a representative task.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A geek-tier team applies `embeddings-model-selection` to their decision-record for an internal task. Owner ml-eng:alice; approver tl:bob; cadence quarterly.

list.item: Use-case brief: «Pick an embedding model by matching (use case, constraints, capabilities). Output is a decision record with chosen model + rejected alternatives.»

section.title: Walkthrough
section.p: The team runs the four-step procedure described in `content/04-procedure.xml`, recording one paragraph per step in `outputs/embeddings-model-selection-record.md`. At step 3 the decision-gate triggers and routes the artefact to the senior-review subagent (opus). The final artefact is signed by tl:bob and stored at `outputs/embeddings-model-selection-record.md`.

list.item: The decision-tree in `content/06-decision-tree.xml` saved one round of confusion at step 2 by routing to the right rule.
The output contract validator (`scripts/validate-embeddings-model-selection.py`) caught a missing approver field before merge.
The 90-day review reminder is on tl:bob's calendar; the artefact will be revisited then.
